/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/chronos-daemon.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/chronos-daemon.dir/src/main_daemon.cpp.o" -o chronos-daemon   -L/home/zer0/.local/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/zer0/CHRONO/build:/home/zer0/CHRONO/build/_deps/libgit2-build:/home/zer0/.local/lib libchronos_core.so -lsqlite3 _deps/libgit2-build/libgit2.so.1.8.1 /usr/lib/libpcre.so /usr/lib/libz.so -lrt /usr/lib/libtree-sitter.so -ltree-sitter-cpp /usr/lib/libtree-sitter.so -ltree-sitter-cpp -ltree-sitter-python
